ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hospital */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the hospital */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information (e.g., phone number, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "icu_units" (
  "icu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ICU unit */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital that the ICU belongs to */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the ICU unit */,
  "bed_count" INTEGER /* Total number of beds in the ICU unit */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the ICU */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the ICU */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the ICU */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the ICU (e.g., Cardiac, Neurological) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icu_units_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital where the patient is admitted */,
  "icu_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ICU where the patient is admitted (if applicable) */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was admitted */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was discharged */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the patient (e.g., admitted, discharged, deceased) */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Primary diagnosis of the patient */,
  "admission_reason" TEXT /* Reason for admission */,
  "assigned_staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary healthcare staff assigned to the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_icu_id FOREIGN KEY ("icu_id") REFERENCES icu_units ("icu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_assigned_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discharges" (
  "discharge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discharge record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient being discharged */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of the discharge */,
  "discharge_type" TEXT /* Type of discharge (e.g., to home, transferred, deceased) */,
  "discharge_reason" TEXT /* Reason for discharge */,
  "next_of_kin_name" TEXT /* Name of the next of kin */,
  "next_of_kin_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the next of kin */,
  "discharge_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the patient's condition at discharge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discharge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discharges_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital where the staff works */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., nurse, doctor, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the staff member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the staff member */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the staff member (e.g., Cardiology, Surgery) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department in which the staff member works (e.g., Emergency, Pediatrics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_status_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient whose status is being logged */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the patient */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the status was recorded */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who updated the status */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_status_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_status_logs_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_utilization" (
  "utilization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource utilization record */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital using the resources */,
  "icu_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ICU using the resources (if applicable) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the resource utilization */,
  "staff_used" INTEGER /* Number of staff members utilized */,
  "medical_supplies_used" INTEGER /* Count of medical supplies used */,
  "equipment_used" INTEGER /* Count of medical equipment used */,
  "medication_used" INTEGER /* Count of medications used */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of resources used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utilization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_utilization_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_utilization_icu_id FOREIGN KEY ("icu_id") REFERENCES icu_units ("icu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for cumulative stats */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital */,
  "icu_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ICU */,
  "cumulative_intake" INTEGER /* Cumulative intake of patients */,
  "cumulative_discharge" INTEGER /* Cumulative discharge of patients */,
  "cumulative_death" INTEGER /* Cumulative death count */,
  "total_intake" INTEGER /* Total number of patients admitted */,
  "total_discharge" INTEGER /* Total number of patients discharged */,
  "total_death" INTEGER /* Total number of patient deaths */,
  "average_length_of_stay" TEXT /* Average length of stay for patients */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_stats_icu_id FOREIGN KEY ("icu_id") REFERENCES icu_units ("icu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_stats_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)
